agent_name: Subscription Optimizer Agent — MCP-Powered SaaS Cost Intelligence Engine
description: Connects to enterprise databases via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to extract live SaaS license data, identifies duplicate and overlapping tools deterministically using Python, and synthesizes a cost-cutting SOP with exact savings projections. ROI: identifies an average of 15-30% of recoverable SaaS budget in minutes without requiring a CSV export.
